item.title: Israel Gives Itself More Control Over Occupied West Bank
item.description: The security cabinet took actions that make it easier for Jews to buy land in the territory. Critics say the changes violate the Oslo Accords and inte...

item.title: Starmer’s Epstein Crisis
item.description: Among the powerful men facing fallout from the files, the one in deepest trouble appears to have never met Epstein: the British prime minister.

item.title: Olympic Athletes Jump For Joy and Break Their Medals
item.description: As Olympians report their medals detaching from their ribbons, game organizers are scrambling to fix the issue. This is not the first time that Olympi...

item.title: Olympic P.S.A.: Do Not Jump for Joy While Wearing Your Medal
item.description: Several athletes have had their medals fall off their ribbons while celebrating their victories. Organizers are looking into it: “This is something we...

item.title: Iran Detains Opposition Leaders Following Talks with Trump Administration
item.description: The detentions of politicians from Iran’s reformist opposition follow mass arrests and a string of repression tactics aimed at preventing further anti...
